title: 目標達成の後に・春雷を目指して

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having finally strengthened her body up enough,
Tamamo Cross is ecstatic when I give her the
green light to take on the senior G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Oguri Cap, Tamamo Cross's
roommate and close friend, is making steady
progress in her classic year...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And her running has an inexplicable hold on
Tamamo Cross's attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to put up a good fight against her,
Tamamo Cross heads for the Hanshin Daishoten.
This race will make for the perfect stepping stone
to her father's beloved race, the spring Tenno
Sho.
